question: Show the name of customer with at least two renting history records.
sql: SELECT name FROM Customers WHERE id IN (SELECT customer_id FROM Renting_history GROUP BY customer_id HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2);

back_translation.intent: 查询满足特定条件的客户姓名
filters: id IN (SELECT customer_id FROM Renting_history GROUP BY customer_id HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2)

semantic.reason: 语义完全一致，原始问题要求显示至少有两次租借记录的客户姓名，SQL反向翻译描述通过关联Renting_history表并使用GROUP BY和HAVING子句正确实现了这一逻辑。
